AI Call Handler vs
Virtual Receptionist: Which Wins?

An honest comparison for UK tradespeople. See cost, availability, call handling capacity, and trade-specific features side by side.

Try AI Call Handling Free

Head-to-Head Comparison

FeatureAI Call HandlerVirtual ReceptionistWinner
Cost
£59/mo flat
AI costs 70-85% less than human receptionists.
£200-400/mo AI
Availability
24/7, 365 days
AI never sleeps, takes breaks, or calls in sick.
Shift-based, sick days, holidays AI
Simultaneous calls
Unlimited
AI handles 50 calls at once without queueing.
1-2 per agent AI
Setup time
30 minutes
AI is live immediately. Humans need training.
2-5 days AI
Personal touch
Consistent, polite
Humans excel at emotional connection.
Warm, empathetic Human
Trade knowledge
Trained on your terms
AI knows 'combi boiler' vs 'system boiler' instantly.
Must be taught AI
Delivery
WhatsApp instant
Tradespeople live on WhatsApp, not email.
Email summary AI
Contract
None — cancel anytime
No lock-in with AI. Freedom to leave.
12-month typical AI

Which Should You Choose?

Choose AI If...

  • You miss calls while working on jobs
  • You want to save £1,700+ per year
  • You need 24/7 coverage without paying night rates
  • You want WhatsApp delivery, not email summaries
  • You handle 5+ calls per day
  • You want instant setup without training anyone

Choose Human If...

  • You handle sensitive/emotional enquiries (funerals, counselling)
  • Your customers expect white-glove personal service
  • You get fewer than 3 calls per week
  • You prefer building personal relationships with every caller
  • Budget is not a primary concern

Cost Breakdown: 12-Month Comparison

12-month total£708

Monthly fee (avg)£300
Setup cost£50-100
Overage chargesPer minute

12-month total£3,650+
